title: King 52
description:
Epilepsy warning at the last 10 or so seconds!
The King finds a copy of the terrible game Action 52 on eBay and buys it.
He will not be satisfied with it, though...
This video is also a "Parody" of Moto200Alt's "The King downloads Sony Vegas", though, unlike the 90% of said video's responses, I didn't recycle ANY part of Moto200Alt's masterpiece.
It took me 5 days of hard work to make this video, so please comment, subscribe and share this video with your friends.

I would like to thank XelchanTheBrave for the idea and for the Action 52 ROM, Superdarkluigi4ever for helping me with the sentence mixing, the YouTube Poop Italian Forum community for all the support they gave me and my 430+ subscribers for...well, subscribing. MANY THANKS!

I wonder how many people actually read this
